programme.title: Veerey Ki Wedding
programme.desc: Veerey and Geet fall in love and decide to get married. Their plan gets tossed out of the window when her peace-loving father sees Veerey getting involved in a fight, if only to protect a girl, and stamps him as a violent roadside Romeo.

programme.title: Bluffmaster
programme.desc: Ace con artist Roy leads a double life, convincing his girlfriend Simmi he is an ordinary, honest guy. However, when she discovers the truth, he is powerless to save their relationship. After collapsing on the street, Roy discovers he has a brain tumour and hasn't long to live. Before it is too late, his partner and disciple Dittu persuades Roy to take part in one last master plan.

programme.title: Pyare Mohan
programme.desc: A blind man Pyare and his deaf friend Mohan fall in love with twin sisters Preeti and Priya. But their relationships spiral into chaos when the sisters get falsely implicated in a murder case and the men have to find a way to save them.

programme.title: Phir Hera Pheri
programme.desc: The lives of three men changes overnight when they lose all the money they invested in a scam. Now, they must find another way to repay the dreaded loan sharks or face their death.

programme.title: Ek Paheli Maya
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: GANESH
programme.desc: In order to help a friend, Ganesh pretends to love a girl. She hates him when she finds out the truth. Eventually, he truly falls in love with her and must convince her of his true feelings.

programme.title: Bindass Rani
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Shyam Ghanshyam
programme.desc: Sham Gansham (1998) action drama: After their father's murder by a corrupt collector, two brothers seek vengeance years later.

programme.title: Andheri Raat Mein Diya Tere Haath Mein
programme.desc: Two friends join the underworld for wealth and luxury, but one seeks redemption after realizing its dark consequences.

programme.title: Balle Balle Amritsar to LA
programme.desc: Mrs. Bakshi seeks husbands for her daughters, but Balraj and Darcy's visits complicate romance.

programme.title: Chor Pe Mor
programme.desc: Chor Pe Mor (1990) crime drama: A poor man gets robbery money, facing threats from crooks and cops while saving love.

programme.title: Black_Cobra_1987_x264_4000kbs
programme.desc: A lone cop struggles to protect a female photographer from a gang of psychopathic bikers.

programme.title: Coldwater
programme.desc: Tragic events send a teenage boy to a juvenile reform facility in the wilderness run by a retired war colonel.

programme.title: A_Shot_in_the_Dark_Portuguese_SD_4000Kbps
programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: Anonymous_HD_Feature_x264_4mbps
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Buddha Mar Gaya
programme.desc: Laxmikant Kabadiya and his twin sister, Prerna, have made it to the top from the very bottom, and now -- as they are about to land their greatest windfall of all -- an untimely and messy family death spoils their plans.

programme.title: Dharam Chakara (dharam Chakaram Tamil 1997)
programme.desc: A village leader who loses a fight to his enemy Arumugam, causing the death of his lover Vijayalakshmi. Years later, another woman named Vijayalakshmi enters the village, and Chakkaravarthy defends her from Arumugam's goons, rekindling his fight for justice.

programme.title: Action Jackson
programme.desc: Vishi, a small-time crook, looks like AJ, a professional assassin. AJ convinces Vishi to help him fool the mob so he can be with his wife while she has a baby, and as the crooks close in on Vishi, AJ arrives to deal with them.

programme.title: Filhaal
programme.desc: When Sia watches her best friend Rewa slip into depression because of her inability to bear a child, she offers to be her surrogate. Trouble brews when jealousy finds its way into their relationship.

programme.title: Patel S. I. R.

programme.title: Lousy neighbour
programme.desc: You're young, you're attractive, and you want to make something of yourself. In order to achieve success, you move to the big city with a heart full of certainty that luck is always on your side. But how to not lose yourself in the vast sea of countless opportunities? How to know what's really important for you and what is nonessential? Kate is a 23-year-old makeup artist from a small provincial town, and she's absolutely certain that she's got what it takes! She can do it - period! She's joyfully advancing towards her dream with a smile on her face, happy to help anyone in need of her positive attitude along the way. Not even sudden unexpected hardships and difficulties can get her down. But fate seems to be constantly testing her optimism. Will she make it through and come out a winner after all?

programme.title: Curse Of The Nun
programme.desc: A damaged young woman is looking forward to moving to a beautiful new home, but the spirit of a deranged nun wants her to stay right where she is

programme.title: Born To Race Fast Track
programme.desc: Danny Krueger is a twenty-year old street racer who plays by his own rules. After winning a scholarship to the prestigious Fast Lane Racing Academy, Danny finds himself competing against some of the fiercest young drivers in the world. Tension soars on and off the track, and a terrible incident leaves Danny without a racing partner. Facing dismissal from the academy, Danny is forced to team up with an old rival. The pair must learn to set aside their differences as they vie for rookie spots on a professional racing team.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: An investigation of Iran's shadow fleet, which traffics billions in oil and weapons across the Middle East and Russia, revealing how sanctions evasion sustains the regime.

programme.title: The Circuit
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets California's First Couple, Gavin Newsom and Jennifer Siebel Newsom: though the next presidential election is more than two years away, the governor is widely considered the frontrunner for the Democratic nomination, a position reinforced by his sometimes-gleeful attacks on President Donald Trump.

programme.title: Can't Look Away: The Case Against Social Media
programme.desc: Exploring the real-life cases handled by the Social Media Victims Law Center, which assists parents of children who have died as a result of harmful internet activities. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: The Making of a Chinese Spy - Ji Chaoqun was a promising young engineer from Beijing heading to the US to study. Then China's spy agency came calling with bags of cash, the promise of glory and an offer that would change his life forever.

programme.title: Posthuman
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets some of the world's most advanced, and most intelligent, robots. Will the creation of a synthetic species with human-like intelligence improve the human experience, or end it?

programme.title: Posthuman
programme.desc: Emily Chang explores the future of connections with the machines and the technologies powering a growing market of relationships-on-demand.

programme.title: Posthuman
programme.desc: From brain implants that allow paralyzed patients to communicate to the wearable devices enhancing our capabilities, brain-computer interfaces could change the way we use our minds forever.

programme.title: Posthuman
programme.desc: From birth to death, tech is stretching the boundaries of biology exploring the discoveries that could transform reproduction, healthcare and how humans die.

programme.title: Businessweek Convenes: Black Leaders Face the DEI
programme.desc: Bloomberg Businessweek hosts an exclusive roundtable with Black business leaders like Ursula Burns and Lisa Wardell to discuss the impact of DEI rollbacks across corporate America. (S1 E01)

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: A uniquely emotional documentary that will touch the heart of audiences around the world. Four female climbers face the sporting challenge of a lifetime as they attempt to compete in the first ever Olympic climbing competition at Tokyo 2020.

programme.title: How China Is Building an Army of Hackers
programme.desc: China and the US actively engage in cyber espionage for strategic advantage. Leaked files now suggest how rapidly Beijing is catching up in preparation for any future conflict.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: Nikolaj Coster-Waldau begins season two, and we're reminded of the delicate balance between human progress and protecting our planet.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: Nikolaj travels the world to meet people transforming waste into resources showing that waste isn't something to hide -- it's something we can rethink as valuable raw material.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: From transforming concrete into a carbon sink to mining nickel from genetically enhanced plants, we meet the bold inventors preserving and adapting to nature's offerings to help humanity thrive.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: Meeting humanity's insatiable demand for energy while still curbing greenhouse emissions will require creative solutions both big and small.

programme.title: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: Alexander Stubb,
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua visits Finland, where the threat from neighboring Russia looms large she speaks to President Alexander Stubb about Finnish resilience and how his country is preparing for an uncertain future. (S1 E01)

programme.title: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua meets Ray Dalio on OceanX in the port of Nice for the UN Ocean Conference. They speak about radical transparency, building and leaving one of the largest hedge funds and what's next.

programme.title: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua talks with Franklin Templeton CEO Jenny Johnson about how to steer a $1.6 trillion business amid the rise of AI, shifting politics and booming private markets.

programme.title: W-Two Worlds Apart
programme.desc: A Love Story Between A Couple In Their Early Thirties. They Belong To The Same Era But Alternate Realities. A Surgical Resident Is Pulled Into The Webtoon World Of W, Which Was Created By Her Father, And Becomes Entangled In A Murder Mystery

programme.title: King in the Love
programme.desc: Set in the Goryeo dynasty, it tells the story of a young and ambitious monarch Won (Im Si-wan) with a desire to conquer, and two people who shape his destiny childhood friend Wang Rin (Hong Jong-hyun) and a beautiful young woman named San (Im Yoon-ah).

programme.title: Extra Ordinary
programme.desc: This is a fantasy romance drama about Dan Oh and Ha Ru, who one day find out that they are unimportant characters of a cartoon and change the storyline to make their relationship work out!

programme.title: Medical Top Team
programme.desc: Follows the journey of creating Korea's best multidisciplinary medical team and the stories of doctors inside. Characters who have different hurts and dilemmas struggle as they get to work together and gradually learn that healing a person is healing oneself.

programme.title: My Secret Terrius
programme.desc: Go Ae Rin suddenly loses her husband. A mysterious man, Kim Bon, lives next door. Kim Bon is a legendary NIS agent. He helps Ae Rin uncover a conspiracy, which husband became involved with.

programme.title: Dear My First Love
programme.desc: A Group Of Yoon Tae Oh'S Friends Suddenly Move Into His House For Their Own Personal Reasons, Where They Experience Love, Friendships, And Struggles.

programme.title: Hide & seek
programme.desc: The Tangled Fates Of The Heiress Of A Cosmetics Company And A Woman Who Had To Achieve Everything On Her Own.

programme.desc: A temporary teacher at an elementary school realizes that one of her students is being abused at home by her family.

programme.title: Medical Top Team
programme.desc: Follows the journey of creating Korea's best multidisciplinary medical team and the stories of doctors inside. Characters who have different hurts and dilemmas struggle as they get to work together and gradually learn that healing a person is healing oneself.

programme.title: My Secret Terrius
programme.desc: Go Ae Rin suddenly loses her husband. A mysterious man, Kim Bon, lives next door. Kim Bon is a legendary NIS agent. He helps Ae Rin uncover a conspiracy, which husband became involved with.

programme.title: Hide & seek
programme.desc: The Tangled Fates Of The Heiress Of A Cosmetics Company And A Woman Who Had To Achieve Everything On Her Own.

programme.title: Yam Kisi Se Kam Nahin
programme.desc: A misfit, a God, a husband, and a breadwinner, Yamraj is a common man with a fancy job title. He tries his best to give his family what they need and manages to make a mess of everything in the bargain. Lovable and goofy, this God of Death is anything but grim. Join our hardworking but hen-pecked Yamraj, his beloved buffalo and his motely family and friends in a slice-of-life sitcom to find out how the cookie really crumbles!

programme.title: Dharmakshetra
programme.desc: As The Great War Of Mahabharata Is Over, Kurukshetra Lies Barren In Its Great Warriors And King. The Thin Line Between Fair And Unfair, Deceit And Loyalty, Betrayal And Duty, Has Never Been Questioned. Dharmakshetra Resurfaces These Buried Questions And Allows The Legendary Characters Of This Tale An Opportunity To Tell Their Side Of The Story For The Very First Time. In A Post-Apocalyptic Trial, Held In Maharaj Chitragupta'S Court, The Seeming Villains ‘Kauravas' Are Allowed To Accuse The So Called Heroes ‘Pandavas' And Vice Versa, In An Attempt To Justify Their Actions. On A Primary Level, Dharamkshetra Attempts To Ask Some Key Questions About The Nature Of Humanity, While At The Same Time, It Puts Together The Forgotten Pieces Of The Story We Thought We Knew.

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The story highlights the exploitation happening with the ‘Bunkars' in Banaras, whose craft is appreciated all around the world, but they are paid peanuts by the traders. Amidst this, blooms a love story between the two opposites - Gauri, a bunkar and Garv, a trader. The story is of Gauri who belongs to the bunkar community facing series of incidents which destroys her family and swears to bring about a change in their life and stop the exploitation by directly trading the sarees. This becomes a battle with traders creating hurdles in her life but she is unstoppable.

programme.title: Agni Vayu
programme.desc: Agni Vayu Is A Romantic Thriller That Tells The Story Of A Young, Vibrant Dr. Agni And An Ambitious Investment Banker Vayu. As Their Love Blossoms, An Unfortunate Turn Of Events Happens That Throws Them Amid Conspiracy, Misunderstanding, Swindling, And All Sorts Of Paradoxes At Every Turn. They Set Out On A Journey To Unravel The Mystery Surrounding These Events. Can They Both Solve It Together And Will They Disclose Their Feelings To Each Other During The Journey.

programme.title: Dahej Daasi
programme.desc: This story is about a 19yr old girl named Chunari, who dreams of marriage and a happy family. However, she becomes entangled in the chains of deceit, finding herself on the path to becoming a Dahej Dasi, which is a tradition still prevalent in the backward regions of Rajasthan. The show unfolds into a compelling drama of tradition versus rebellion, love versus oppression.

programme.title: Maata Ki Mahima
programme.desc: In the divine saga inspired by Bhakt Prahlad, witness the journey of Mahima, a devout disciple of Maata, as she challenges the tyranny of Indrayani, whose sins overflow in a reign of oppression. Sent into the heart of Indrayani's lineage, Mahima embodies the triumph of faith over darkness, destined to end the era of tyranny and usher in an era of righteousness.

programme.title: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Hamare
programme.desc: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Humaare Is A Light-Hearted Celebrity Chat Show Hosted By One Of India'S Most Famous Rj– Pritam Singh. In Each Episode, He Will Welcome Top Female Celebrities From The Entertainment Industry Who Have Played The Roles Of Bhabhi'S & Bahu'S On-Screen, Adding A Pinch Of Glamour To The Show. These Female Celebrities Will Talk About Their Real-World, Tell Their Untold Stories And Reveal How They Live Off-Camera. What'S More? The Episodes Of This Chat Show Will Have An Enthralling Line-Up Of Gag Artists, Activities/Games & Comedy Segments, Along With The Barrel Of Laughs – Pritam.

programme.title: Paapnaashini Ganga
programme.desc: Paapnaashini Ganga Is A Mythological Show Based On The Life Of Goddess Ganga. The Show Takes The Viewers On The Journey Of Birth And Life Of Ganga. The Reason Behind Ganga'S Birth Was To Destruct Evil Entities. The Powers Of Adishakti Made Mainavati Give Birth To A Female Child Who Became Known As Ganga. Devatas Considered Ganga'S Purity As A Weapon Which Could Destroy Evil Asuras. As A Humble & Virtuous Woman, Ganga'S Entire Life Was Full Of Hardships, Which She Led Washing Away The Sins Of All Of Humanity Without Any Discrimination. Ganga Had Sacrificed All Her Desires On The Altar Of Dharma And Led A Divine Life Full Of Welfare Of Humanity. The Show Is Visually Appealing With Strong Vfx Which Will Enhance The Viewers Experience.

programme.title: Yam Kisi Se Kam Nahin
programme.desc: A misfit, a God, a husband, and a breadwinner, Yamraj is a common man with a fancy job title. He tries his best to give his family what they need and manages to make a mess of everything in the bargain. Lovable and goofy, this God of Death is anything but grim. Join our hardworking but hen-pecked Yamraj, his beloved buffalo and his motely family and friends in a slice-of-life sitcom to find out how the cookie really crumbles!

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: SWAYANSIDDHA

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.10
programme.desc: Se Gi declares all-out war against Do Hyun, and Ri Jin is taken aback by his icy demeanor. Chae Yeon is startled when Se Gi suddenly appears before her. When Se Gi arrives at the company, all eyes turn to him, and he even confronts Gi Joon directly. Meanwhile, Hwa Ran meets Ri Jin and tells her to report everything Do Hyun does.

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.11
programme.desc: Tae Im faints in shock after seeing Se Gi on the hospital CCTV in Cha Jun Pyo's room. Ri Jin decides to leave home, and Ri On reluctantly lets her go. Meanwhile, Se Gi demands that Ri Jin choose between him and Do Hyun, but Ri Jin retorts, “Then show me what makes you special.”

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.12
programme.desc: Do Hyun despairs after realizing the things Se Gi has done. Chae Yeon grows even more conflicted over Do Hyun's sudden change in attitude. Ri Jin, like Se Gi once did, struggles to help Do Hyun change for the better, while Tae Im meets Seok Ho Pil.

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.13
programme.desc: Ri Jin begins having nightmares, worrying Do Hyun. However, she keeps her distance, prompting Do Hyun to reconsider her relationship with Ri On. Meanwhile, Young Pyo becomes convinced that Min Seo Yeon's child is still alive, and Ri On has his first encounter with Yo Na, one of Do Hyun's personalities.

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.14
programme.desc: Do Hyun regains his laughter while spending time with Ri Jin's family. Soon Young encourages him to pursue Ri Jin and shows him photos of Ri Jin and Ri On as children. Meanwhile, Do Hyun's repressed memories of the basement resurface, and he meets the personality “Nana.” Chae Yeon calls off her engagement with Gi Joon.

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.15
programme.desc: Do Hyun begins to recall his lost memories, while Ri On decides to investigate who was behind Ri Jin's childhood abduction. Ri Jin tries to recall her own past for Do Hyun's sake, but he worries for her. Hwa Ran panics when Do Hyun declares he'll make her illness public.

programme.title: Juggler
programme.desc: Super Hungry" is a comedic adventure showcasing Jerry's insatiable appetite and Jane's playful attempts to feed him. Jane's idea of using "Hunger Syrup" leads to unexpected consequences as Jerry accidentally consumes the entire bottle, causing his hunger to intensify. A hilarious chase ensues as Jerry devours everyt_hing in sight, leaving Jane both amazed and exhausted. With a clever twist involving chili and a bucket of water, Jerry's hunger is finally satiated, resulting in laughter and relief for both characters

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Autumn Awosomeness
programme.desc: Carrot Town was once a low-tech community with candles, wind-up clocks, and woodburning stoves. Then a fluke came along – a free-thinking rabbit named SILAS HOPNER who invented a machine that could turn carrots into a fuel called Carrotsene (like kerosene).

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Shrunk
programme.desc: This series follows Lakha, Bablu and Dablu on brand-new wild adventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that draws visitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife. This wildlife now includes some new but familiar residents: Hugo and friends from the hit movie, The Big Top Secret!

programme.title: Cindrella
programme.desc: Set during the harvest, this season finds Briar, Bramble, and their friends spending every day gathering as much food as possible for the upcoming winter. While they look for mushrooms, corn, and of course Bramble's favorite – honey, they have to keep a sharp eye out for the pesky Logger Vick! Fun falls with every leaf this season as the crew finds new adventures with some new friends. Follow the funny and join in on the laughter as it echoes throughout Pine Tree Mountain.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Shrunk
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu
programme.desc: Carrot Town was once a low-tech community with candles, wind-up clocks, and woodburning stoves. Then a fluke came along – a free-thinking rabbit named SILAS HOPNER who invented a machine that could turn carrots into a fuel called Carrotsene (like kerosene).

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Autumn Awosomeness
programme.desc: Set during the harvest, this season finds Briar, Bramble, and their friends spending every day gathering as much food as possible for the upcoming winter. While they look for mushrooms, corn, and of course Bramble's favorite – honey, they have to keep a sharp eye out for the pesky Logger Vick! Fun falls with every leaf this season as the crew finds new adventures with some new friends. Follow the funny and join in on the laughter as it echoes throughout Pine Tree Mountain.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Shrunk
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Cindrella
programme.desc: Carrot Town was once a low-tech community with candles, wind-up clocks, and woodburning stoves. Then a fluke came along – a free-thinking rabbit named SILAS HOPNER who invented a machine that could turn carrots into a fuel called Carrotsene (like kerosene).

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster Paln
programme.desc: Carrot Town was once a low-tech community with candles, wind-up clocks, and woodburning stoves. Then a fluke came along – a free-thinking rabbit named SILAS HOPNER who invented a machine that could turn carrots into a fuel called Carrotsene (like kerosene).

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb's eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Rodeo and Booster merge into Robo and set a trap for a rogue UFO that' s abducted baby cars from the beach.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Time to merge! A " ghost" has stolen cakes from the cake-eating competition, Rodeo and Booster get ready to stop him.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Rodeo and Booster transform into Robo to catch Zitron after he steals Billy' s pipes. Matilda the Police Car helps them.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Zitron deploys his shark minions to scare the crowd at the beach! Rodeo and Booster must save summer!

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they' re learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner... his mom!

programme.title: Tom' s Car Wash
programme.desc: Tom loves caring for his friends they can always count on Tom to tow them back to his car wash, where they' re guaranteed to leave sparking!

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other' s company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Gogobus
programme.desc: This series is about the adventures of the children, in a beautiful coastal town, who are learning and playing in Sunshine Forest Kindergarten. To keep the children safe, the kindergarten owner builds the world's first artificial intelligence school bus.

programme.title: Fury Spinner
programme.desc: After decades of development, Fury Spinner duel has become one of the most popular sports in the world. At this time, the "Ultimate Feast" Invitational Tournament of Fury Spinner began. The protagonist Meteo is invited to the mysterious island together with other top players in the world to embark on a survival adventure. During the adventure, Meteo not only relied on his determination to protect the weak and gained recognition to unlock the power of the sacred beast, but also got acquainted with the hidden master Kim who came here to find his brother and Joll who wanted to prove as the “perfect warrior” to his father. However, this "Ultimate Feast" tournament is just a conspiracy of the organizer Kenji! He wants to use the players to awaken the evil forces in the island to destroy the world! Meteo and friends stepped forward and tried their best to defeat Kenji.

programme.title: Yaaron Ka Yaar
programme.desc: The character of Chota Buddha is inspired from the happiness spread by laughing buddha. Chota Buddha is the fun-spirited lead of this series who loves helping the people of his village, Changjiang.

programme.title: Armor Monster
programme.desc: One day, 12-year-old Zachary once again met the subway "0" which her mother took nine years ago, and the appearance of the subway seems to have some connection with the necklace left by her mother.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Cubs
programme.desc: Boonie Cubs Season 2 is a bran-new edutainment series showing children that learning can be fun. It follows young Vick, who finds a magical portal in a tree and finds a wonderful world where he attends Pine Tree Kindergarten with young Briar, young Bramble, and other kids where he learns in fun and exciting ways.

programme.title: Perfect Ride

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Sharanam
programme.desc: Sharanam takes viewers on a poignant journey to some of the most revered pilgrimage sites in India to and highlights the traditions, practices, rituals and ideals that bring people to these holy places in search of something greater than themselves. Narrated by Bollywood actress Juhi Chawla, Sharanam showcases testimonies of personal incidents that are the bedrock of the belief, and follows the strong thread of faith that not only binds the pilgrims to their Gods, but also the nation with itself.

programme.title: The Great Escapes
programme.desc: Dive into a world of action, drama, determination and courage while reliving the greatest escape stories of our time in an all new mini-series ‘The Great Escape'.The show is based on true events and takes you on a thrilling ride of the most daring escapes from Indian history. Some of the stories covered in the series include Sushmita Banerjee's escape from the Taliban in Afghanistan, Dalai Lama's escape from Tibet, the story of a daring jailbreak by the inmates of a jail in Punjab, and Indian prisoner-of-war Nihal Singh and Ram Chander Yadav's escape from the clutches of the Chinese in the Indo-China war. The mini-series even has some comments from the people who made these exhilarating escapes, including the Dalai Lama himself. Each episode takes you to different locations across varied time periods. The stylizations of those eras, mixed with the thrill of escape keeps you hooked till the end.

programme.title: Kissa Currency Ka
programme.desc: The introduction of currency was a key step in the evolution of civilization. As the kingdoms and dynasties across the country rose and fell, they left their mark on the currency they produced. This series explores the coins minted by each kingdom in Indian history, and uses stories about the coins to tell the history of the kingdom itself.

programme.title: Saamagri Sampatti Aur Sauda
programme.desc: Saamagri Aur Sampatti is an animated series detailing the journey of various commodities that shaped India's history through their trade, usage, and spread. The history of a few key commodities for India, such as pepper, silk, coffee, and cotton, are covered in this fascinating 9-episode series.

programme.title: Mid
programme.desc: Veteran actor, Naseeruddin Shah, explores the many untold stories of Indian cricket. He recalls the history of the game match highlights. Sportsmanship, stadiums, hits and misses, and many more. In his unique narrative style, Naseeruddin Shah brings alive the humorous side of the game, along with undocumented anecdotes and quirky trivia. The show also features many personalities who narrate cricketing experiences and stories including Shashi Tharoor, Narl Contractor, Bishan Singh Bedi and Charu Sharma amongst others

programme.title: Lost Recipes
programme.desc: Lost Recipes is all about the food which is diffused into the pages of history and the rediscovery of a tradition that once was. Our host Aditya Bal is on a quest to unearth the once-popular culinary traditions through thirteen regions in India.But these recipes are no longer found in cookbooks, old or new, and seem to have evolved with time. Aditya must turn back the clock and wade through folk and lore to find the original, Lost Recipes.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.desc: Alaska is one of the last true wildernesses on earth. But in Anchorage you don't have to head into to the wild to discover the wildlife. With a city that has so much green space, it means everywhere is fair game for its wild neighbours.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: With so many animals living in the city, sometimes they get themselves into trouble. But help is never far away. In Anchorage the wildlife come first, with lots of organisations and people that are working hard to protect them.

programme.title: Animal Society

programme.title: Animal Society

programme.title: Race of Life
programme.desc: Animals adapt for survival. Crocodiles, ancient and resilient, boast slow metabolism and efficient physiology. Sharks retain successful traits over time. Whales, from land to sea, evolve with echolocation and robust anatomy, ensuring survival.

programme.title: Race of Life
programme.desc: Cheetahs race towards endangerment.Leopards thrive as opportunistic hunters.Lions reign atop the food chain. Snow leopards navigate treacherous terrain.Tigers persevere. Each big cat surviving maturity claims victory in life's relentless race.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Chad vs. Pinto

programme.title: Ant Anstead Master Mechanic

programme.title: Safari Flix
programme.desc: Safari Flix is hosted by an experienced ranger/guide who provides compelling in-the-moment narration on the action as it happens. Not only will viewers marvel at the incredible wildlife sightings featured in the show, but so too will they be exposed to a wealth of information on the animals in particular and the African bush and pressing environmental matters in general.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: On this episode of Animal Super Senses, we examine how things taste, and how vital scent is from the animal perspective. But their sense of smell will also detect the scent of odorants carried through the air. In mammals, taste receptor cells are scattered over the tongue. In other creatures, they can be located in some fairly odd places. How taste and smell receptors work underwater, well, it's a whole other world.

programme.title: Shark Gordon
programme.desc: Dive in and meet these majestic creatures face-to-face. First up is the most notorious shark in nature the ultimate predator: The Great White.

programme.title: Snake Master
programme.desc: Renowned herpetologist Nirut Chomngam takes viewers on a wild journey across the country in an unforgettable adventure filled with deadly encounters, as he joins conservation teams tasked with protecting these astonishing creatures and their jungle home.

programme.title: Animal Armory
programme.desc: From venomous snakes to deadly fish, some animals have evolved chemical weapons to hunt or defend. This episode dives into the biology behind lethal toxins in the wild.

programme.desc: Dive in and meet these majestic creatures face-to-face. First up is the most notorious shark in nature the ultimate predator: The Great White.

programme.title: Snake Master
programme.desc: Renowned herpetologist Nirut Chomngam takes viewers on a wild journey across the country in an unforgettable adventure filled with deadly encounters, as he joins conservation teams tasked with protecting these astonishing creatures and their jungle home.

programme.title: Beaded Lizard vs. Gila Monster!
programme.desc: Beaded lizard vs. Gila monster. Coyote compares these venomous reptiles in a desert showdown, highlighting their bite strength and venom use.One of the world's most dangerous stings comes from the killer bee. Coyote gets stung and breaks down their behavior and threat level.

programme.title: Stung and Bit! Bullet Ant vs. Soldier Ant
programme.desc: What's worse—bitten or stung? Mark tests both by taking a bullet ant sting and a soldier ant bite back to back.Would you drink a smoothie made from puke fruit? Coyote samples this notoriously disgusting treat in the name of curiosity and culture.

programme.title: Face Off with a Giant Turtle!
programme.desc: Coyote faces off with a giant turtle in this land-vs-sea showdown. Jaws, strength, and attitude make it an unforgettable encounter.A fish crime in Texas? Coyote investigates a shocking environmental event where something—or someone—is disrupting an aquatic food chain.

programme.title: Pinched by an Elephant Beetle!
programme.desc: The elephant beetle is huge, but its pinch may be even bigger. Coyote gets a close-up grip and tests its impressive strength.Coyote samples the infamous snake fruit. With a bizarre smell and unexpected flavor, it's a taste test that challenges more than just the tongue.

programme.title: Monster Ant Chews to the Bone!
programme.desc: A monster ant with a bite that could rival its name. Mark tests its jaws and explores its defense mechanisms in this up-close challenge.Why does parrot blood look so strange? Coyote analyzes its color, chemistry, and what secrets it may hold about avian evolution.

programme.title: Would You Survive This Obstacle Course Challenge?!
programme.desc: Can you survive this wilderness obstacle course? Coyote takes on a challenge of physical grit and wild surprises in this action-packed adventure.One of the most dangerous snakes alive, the black mamba is captured and relocated safely with Coyote's help. A heart-pounding rescue mission.

programme.title: Not Again! – 10,000 Bees vs. Face
programme.desc: 10,000 bees on one face?! Coyote goes viral again in this nerve-wracking attempt to see if he can stay still long enough to survive.

programme.title: Bitten by a Giant Bloodworm!
programme.desc: A second sighting of the rare blue frog leaves Coyote stunned. The frog's vibrant coloration is even more incredible up close.Giant bloodworms have jaws and venom, and they're not shy about using either. Mark finds out the hard way.

programme.title: Stung by 200 Angry Yellowjackets!
programme.desc: 200 angry yellowjackets swarm Coyote during this painful sting challenge. He analyzes the results while barely keeping his cool.A filming prank turns into a police encounter! Coyote gets arrested while making a video—proof that wild adventures sometimes cross the line.

programme.title: Bitten by Giant Soldier Ants!
programme.desc: Ants that don't just bite—they coordinate! Coyote is bitten by giant soldier ants to demonstrate their incredible defense strategy.

programme.title: Bitten by 3 Toxic Worms! (Which Is Worst?)
programme.desc: Three worms, three different toxins. Coyote compares the effects of each to determine which toxic worm inflicts the worst bite of all.Cold-stunned sea turtles wash ashore, helpless. Mark joins a rescue effort to revive and release these beautiful reptiles back to the ocean.

programme.title: Venomous Sewer Snake Found in Bangkok!
programme.desc: Urban exploration gets wild when Mark finds a rare venomous snake deep in the sewer systems of Bangkok.This insect doesn't bite—it sprays acid! Mark discovers a rare bug with an unbelievable defense mechanism aimed right at the eyes.

programme.title: Stung by an Electric Caterpillar!
programme.desc: This episode features a painful sting from the electric caterpillar, a bizarre jungle dweller with venomous barbs. It's shocking—literally.A sting from Japan's meanest wasp! This aggressive insect doesn't hold back. Mark's reaction is both painful and fascinating.

programme.title: Burned by a Giant Fireworm!
programme.desc: The giant fireworm brings the burn—literally. Mark handles this bizarre sea creature and ends up with chemical irritation on his skin.Coyote explores a lost island, teeming with mystery. From rare creatures to haunting terrain, this wild place holds unexpected surprises.

programme.title: Love Bites With Joey

programme.title: Mercedes-Benz DRIVE PILOT
programme.desc: The exact location of a Mercedes equipped with DRIVE PILOT is determined using a high-precision positioning system that is much more powerful than conventional GPS systems. In addition to the anonymised data collected by LiDAR, camera, radar and ultrasound sensors, a digital HD map provides a three-dimensional image of the road and the surroundings with information on road geometry, route characteristics, traffic signs and special traffic events (e.g. accidents or road works). This high-precision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

programme.title: Kia Sportage Exterior Design in Lunar Silver
programme.desc: A number of new technologies optimize the precision and control of the chassis in a wide variety of weather and road conditions. The standard electronic damper control (Electronic Control Suspension, ECS) in the GT-line version increases comfort and safety thanks to the continuous damping control. The system reacts to body movements and steering inputs and changes the damping behavior at lightning speed in order to counteract the vehicle's diving, pitching and rolling movements when cornering. It also adjusts the damping force in the case of obstacles in order to cope with them as comfortably as possible and to reduce the influence of post-vibrations on the wheels. A premiere for the Sportage is the “All-Terrain-Mode”, which will be available for the plug-in hybrid version with all-wheel drive. The system offers intelligent support when driving off-road or on snow by automatically optimizing the vehicle settings depending on the selected mode and thus helping the SUV to achieve maximum traction on muddy, sandy or snowy surfaces.

programme.title: The new Mercedes-Benz GLC AMG Line World Premiere Teaser
programme.desc: The new GLC is immediately recognisable as a member of the Mercedes-Benz SUV family. Standard equipment includes the AVANTGARDE exterior with Chrome package including chrome window surrounds and a new, chrome-look simulated underguard. This adds striking design features and enhances the unique proportions of the vehicle. One of the defining design highlights of the GLC is the redesigned front end, with headlamps that connect directly to the radiator grille to emphasise the vehicle's width, and the new radiator grille as part of the standard AVANTGARDE exterior, which now has a chrome surround and a sporty louvre in matt grey with chrome trim. The AMG Line has a radiator grille with Mercedes-Benz pattern. The body design is characterised by a full, spanned surface design enriched with precisely shaped edges in the sides. These emphasise the proportions, accentuate the muscular wheel arches and create a balance between elegance and off-road performance. Wheel arch liners in the vehicle colour are available from the AMG Line upwards for the first time. These accentuate the sportiness of the AMG Line, as optional equipment in conjunction with mixed tyres. Also available as an optional extra are easy-entry running boards and, from the AMG Line upwards, a Night package.

programme.title: MINI TAKES THE STATES 2022 hits the road for another epic adventure
programme.desc: The one-make championship, organized by MINI Italia with the support of ACI Sport, is ready to kick off the eleventh season. This year there are three categories that compete on the tracks of the main Italian circuits, in six exciting events from 2 July to 23 October 2022. San Donato Milanese. Now in its eleventh consecutive edition, the MINI Challenge 2022 single-make championship warms up its engines to start a season full of challenges. Also this year, MINI Italia renews its commitment to organizing one of the most exciting competitions on the Italian scene. Passion, challenge, community and the art of performance are among the values of the famous championship signed by the iconic premium brand with a sporting DNA. The six events of 2022 will see the drivers compete on the tracks of the most famous national circuits. The MINI John Cooper Works Challenge Lite, the MINI John Cooper Works Challenge Pro and the MINI John Cooper Works Challenge Evo are ready to challenge each other in a new season full of emotions. The Academy race category continues in 2022, which also sees the under 25s on the track, as part of the MINI program dedicated to young people.

programme.title: The Mercedes EQS SUV Electric Art Line Driving Video
programme.desc: With the luxury saloon EQS and the sporty executive saloon EQE, Mercedes-Benz has entered a new, all-electric era in the upper market segments as well. The EQS SUV, the third model series with this architecture developed for electric vehicles, will soon follow. The SUV offers plenty of space, comfort and connectivity for up to seven passengers in its avant-garde, luxurious interior. Thanks to powerful electric motors, responsive 4MATIC all-wheel drive and an intelligent OFFROAD driving mode, the EQS SUV is also capable of tackling light terrain with ease. The new EQS SUV shares the long wheelbase (3210 millimetres) with the EQS Saloon, but is over 20 centimetres higher. The dimensions in detail: 5125/1959/1718 millimetres (length/width/height). The interior dimensions benefit from these generous SUV dimensions and from the advantages of the purpose design tailored to the electric platform. The second row of seats can be electrically adjusted as standard. Up to four golf bags fit in the boot. A third row of seats with two additional individual seats and extensive comfort features for all passengers is available as an option.

programme.desc: Automotions

programme.title: Colour change with the power of thought
programme.sub-title: The BMW iX Flow meets neuro-technology - Colour change with the power of thought - The BMW iX Flow meets neuro-technology
programme.desc: The Munich-based startup brainboost used the new and improved colour-changing effect in a one-off collaboration with the BMW Group at rad°hub aimed at raising awareness of mental health. With the help of brainboost, the BMW iX Flow was connected directly to the brain of the rad°hub delegates using an electroencephalograph (EEG), which records the brain's electrical activity. “The colour patterns of the BMW iX Flow react to brain activity and reflect the level of activity,” explains brainboost CEO Philipp Heiler. “Once the brain is at rest, the changes of patterns on the iX Flow also become calmer and more rhythmical.” A special animation was activated if delegates managed to maintain this state for several seconds. Thus, the participants were able to gradually calm and relax their brains under the guidance of the brainboost experts and with the help of neurofeedback via the iX Flow. This matures the knowledge of which strategies work best to specifically shut down one's own brain activity for relaxation, e.g. in everyday working life.

programme.title: Wellbeing behind the wheel – The new Bentley Azure Range_en
programme.sub-title: Wellbeing behind the wheel – The new Bentley Azure Range
programme.desc: To celebrate the arrival of the new Bentayga EWB, an exclusive First Edition is now available. Subject to a limited production run for the first twelve months of orders, it combines many of the most desirable options available for the car with a package of eye-catching details found only on Bentley First Editions. First Edition badging can be seen to the exterior of the car – a theme that extends inside, with badging on the veneered fascia, as well as embroidery on the seats. Unique First Edition contrast stitching and embroidery adorns the seats and, depending on the choice of veneers, handcrafted metal overlays just 0.075 mm thick can be applied to the fascia and waistrails in the front and the rear door veneer. The First Edition offers elegant and timeless design, focusing on maximum comfort and well-being. This specifically tailored specification includes a unique 22” ten-spoke directional wheel and bright lower bumper grilles. Other additional features as standard include unique quilted seats, mood lighting, a heated steering wheel, and increased driver's assistance aids. Attention to detail is clear, from the badging that identifies the car to the jewelled caps on the fuel and oil fillers.

programme.title: The new Porsche 911 GT3 R
programme.sub-title: Design_en - The new Porsche 911 GT3 R - Design
programme.desc: The turbocharged three-litre flat-six in the new 911 GTS delivers 353 kW (480 PS). Maximum torque is 570 Nm, an increase of 20 Nm over its predecessor. Zero to 100 km/h takes just 3.3 seconds (911 Carrera 4 GTS: Fuel consumption combined (NEDC) 10.5 – 9.7 l/100 km, Fuel consumption combined (WLTP) 11.4 – 10.6 l/100 km, CO₂ emissions combined (NEDC) 240 – 222 g/km, CO₂ emissions combined (WLTP) 259 – 240 g/km) in the 911 Carrera 4 GTS Coupé with the eight-speed Porsche dual-clutch transmission (PDK): three tenths faster than its predecessor. A seven-speed manual transmission with a particularly short throw is available for all 911 GTS models as an alternative to the PDK.

programme.title: From concept vehicle to full-production ID
programme.sub-title: From concept vehicle to full-production ID. Buzz - How was the electric Microbus created
programme.desc: The new model line's assistance systems perfect ease of driving and safety. Included as standard in the ID. Buzz and ID. Buzz Cargo is the ‘Car2X' local warning system, which utilises signals from other vehicles and the transport infrastructure to spot hazards in real time. Also included as standard: the ‘Front Assist' emergency braking function and, in the MPV, the ‘Lane Assist' lane-keeping assistant. With new software, new assistance functions are also making their way into the ID. family. Available as an option is ‘Travel Assist with swarm data', which facilitates partially automated driving across the entire speed range and, for the first time, assisted lane-changing on the motorway. Also new: the ‘Memory Function' for automated parking on a previously saved route.

programme.title: New 2023 Range Rover Sport Product Highlights_en
programme.sub-title: New 2023 Range Rover Sport Design Reveal Film
programme.desc: The New Range Rover Sport has made its global premiere with a dramatic world-first climb up a flooded dam spillway in Iceland. The epic ascent saw New Range Rover Sport resist the surging torrent of water flowing down the ramp of the Karahnjukar Dam – the biggest of its kind in the world – at a rate of 750 tonnes per minute. A loss of traction risked plunging down the perilous 90m drop at the base of the spillway to the valley floor below. The successful spillway ascent was screened for the first time at an exclusive launch event at Jaguar Land Rover's Advanced Product Creation Centre at Gaydon, UK. Official James Bond stunt driver Jessica Hawkins was behind the wheel as the New Range Rover Sport demonstrated its grip, traction, performance and composure, completing the latest in a series of challenges for Land Rover's luxury performance SUV. Previous feats include a record-setting hill-climb at Pikes Peak, a first recorded crossing of the ‘Empty Quarter' desert in the Arabian Peninsula and a first ascent of the 999 steps to Heaven's Gate in China, in 2018.

Jack used to travel a lot for work and was forced to eat out often so now he really enjoys cooking at home for Beth and for his 2 teenage children (they live with them part time). Beth doesn't do the cooking but likes to sit act as sous chef or watch Jack prepare the meal while she sips wine (she LOVES wine). They often have friends over and like many houses, guests congregate in the kitchen so they would love an island to anchor the kitchen.

programme.title: Pure Design
programme.desc: Carm and Jason bought their house from Jason's father. It is the house where Jason grew up in and has lived for 26 years. They have done a lot of renovations on the house since they purchased it. They tore down walls on the first floor and closed off the stairs to create a closet so now it's open-concept. They made changes to the second floor and most recently they put an addition on the back of the house and raised the ceiling height in the basement.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent
programme.desc: Stephanie is making a big move from BC to Guelph to be closer to her son John and his family. She doesn't want the move to be a hassle and is looking for an accessible, decent-sized home for her grandchildren and visitors from BC. Good sized guest rooms and a large backyard are a must. As she loves to cook, she would also like a new kitchen. Eve will show Stephanie 3 beautiful homes that fit the criteria. Stephanie is going to have a difficult decision.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent
programme.desc: Steve Bailey, Mike Donia and Daryl King review their favourite homes. Steve takes us down memory lane to his 18th century farmhouse, and another home with a stunning infinity pool. Daryl's listings range from King city to Caloden, with helicopter pads and sprawling backyards. Mike brings us back to his fabulous listings in Thailand. He shows us a home made entirely of Bamboo, and billion-dollar property.

programme.title: Accidental Chef
programme.desc: Melvyn finds himself in seafood galore as he heads to Xiamen, China this week. He meets two different families- one living in a rustic fishing village and the other, the owner of a famous restaurant chain in Xiamen.

programme.title: Accidental Chef
programme.desc: Melvyn experiences the contrasts in multicultural Malaysia where he meets up with two very different families: Malaysian royalty who live in an upscale suburb in a sprawling bungalow and a family belonging to the Mah Meri tribe, a once nomadic indigenous people who still live off the land.

programme.title: Design For You: Trends
programme.desc: Ehrardt Nieuwoudt from Kim H Designs takes us on a tour of the iconic Sanctuary Mandela which he and his team have designed.

programme.title: Luxury Life
programme.desc: In this episode we look at the L.A motor show and Jaguar, the Colour Run, the Saalbach Classic, Michael Chow, the Dean Collection.

programme.title: Luxury Life
programme.desc: In this episode we cover the Peninsula artists, Volvo Ocean Race, 100 years of the Coca-Cola bottle, London beach vollyball, Guggenheim museum in Bilbao, Idris Elba and the Jaguar XE road trip.

programme.title: The Beet
programme.sub-title: The World of Worm Composting with Steve Churchill
programme.desc: Discover worm composting, a process where worms eat your garbage and turn it into garden gold.

programme.desc: A flower farmer on 6 acres, Galena Berkompas shares her tips to grow your own exquisite flowers.

programme.title: The Beet
programme.sub-title: Growing Food Anywhere with Logan Hailey
programme.desc: Farming while living a nomadic life? Yes! Guest Logan Hailey explains how to grow things everywhere.

programme.title: The Beet
programme.sub-title: Growing Incredible Mushrooms with Louis Giller
programme.desc: Delve into the fascinating world of fungi and mushrooms with an edible mushroom expert.

programme.title: The Beet: A Podcast for Plant Lovers

programme.title: Finishing our Unfinished Kitchen Projects
programme.desc: I revisit the kitchen makeover and fix things that I never finished.

programme.desc: Solo storage room reorganization! I tackle cleaning our ugly storage space while Kelsey is away.

programme.title: Full Studio Makeover
programme.desc: We are finally updating our bland studio filming room that was left unfinished during the office makeover.

programme.title: Make Your Own Lime Wash Paint
programme.desc: After many sample batches and different formulas tested, I've come up with my very own limewash recipe.

programme.title: Adding a Giant Mural to Our Office
programme.desc: With the recent addition of the closed off wall, the mural wall in our office needed to be changed.

programme.title: Can We Put Up A Huge Wall Without Our Boss Knowing?
programme.desc: While Kelsey was away on her vacation, I thought it would be so fun to surprise her with a statement wall!

programme.title: Transforming Our Secret Outdoor Space
programme.desc: Watch as we navigate pulling out weeds, building outdoor furniture and strive for a moody outdoor vibe.

programme.title: Check Out This Cool Thrift Find for Our Office
programme.desc: You've all been waiting for it, the final touches for the office on this season of Loft Vibes are here!

programme.title: Our DIY Home Office Makeover
programme.desc: Kelsey transforms Elliott's kitchen into a multi-functional home office in their shared space.

programme.title: We Learn How To Reupholster
programme.desc: Follow along witth Kelsey as she learns how to reupholster in a week!

programme.title: Our DIY Colorful Bathroom Makeover
programme.desc: I'm transforming my small upstairs bathroom with a serious color injection and personality!

programme.title: The Ultimate Living Room Makeover
programme.desc: Today, we're revamping Kelsey's living room into a moody media room.

programme.title: Cozy & Moody Living Room Makeover
programme.desc: Check out our basic living room transform into a cozy, moody movie/gaming room with dark paint & new tech!

programme.title: Chef Swap At The Beach: Catch And Cook
programme.desc: Host Chef Mason Zeglen dives deep into the heart of Myrtle Beach with two very special family-run restaurants. Fiesta Mexicana's Chef Gabe Hernandez swaps kitchens with Chef Jonathan Glass of Nonna's Taste of Italy for a Lunch-Plate-Special showdown. Who will bring home the Chef Swap knife?

programme.title: Lucky in Love Ep 1
programme.desc: Canadians Sophie and Anna go on a journey of discovery, luck and love in the Cradle of Liberty, Boston, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Lucky in Love Ep 2
programme.desc: Gabby and Jono try their luck in panoramic Salt Lake City, Utah.

programme.title: Lucky in Love Ep 3
programme.desc: Percy and Michelle go on a game of chance in the Emerald city of Seattle.

programme.title: Ellis Family Vacation
programme.desc: The Ellis Family explores Washington D.C., discovering monuments, Ford's Theatre, and the best cupcakes in the capital!

programme.title: Ellis Family Vacation
programme.desc: The Ellis Family road trips to the Grand Canyon and Zion National Park in search of some outdoor fun.

programme.title: Ellis Family Vacation
programme.desc: The Ellis Family ventures to the Big Easy, soaking up the culture of New Orleans with jazz, beignets, airboat adventures, and more.

programme.title: Ellis Family Vacation
programme.desc: The Ellis Family checks out Birmingham, Alabama, ground zero of the Civil Rights Movement, visiting museums, monuments, and locations that helped end segregation in the United States.

programme.title: Soul of The South
programme.desc: Join writer and photographer Johny Pitts as he journeys along the Civil Rights Trail through the American South. From Tennessee to Mississippi to Alabama, discover the people and the places, the music, food, and culture, linked to this pivotal period in world history.

programme.title: Paul & Nicks Big American Food Trip
programme.desc: Paul and Nick meet with Colin Brooks of the 1718 project, founded to investigate the historical links between Ulster, Scotland and Philadelphia. They also cook for Randall Redman, who claims to be able to trace his ancestry to Robert The Bruce.

programme.title: Paul & Nicks Big American Food Trip
programme.desc: Philadelphia was one of the main entry ports for immigrants to America in the 18th century. Paul and Nick meet Drew McGinty and Joyce Alexander, the founder of the Center for Ulster-Scots Studies. Our chefs try to cook an Ulster-Scots meal, but keep being seduced by Italian fare.

programme.title: Into America's Wild
programme.desc: Step off the beaten path and connect to your inner trailblazer in this cross-country journey to some of the most beautiful but little-known landscapes of North America.

programme.title: Get Out of Town
programme.desc: Relive the golden age of Hollywood.

programme.title: Get Out of Town
